docs.title: Documentation Home
docs.text:
Welcome to the Andromeda Server Documentation.

  • Containers

    Review active LXC containers, verify resource allocations, and check service status.

  • Network

    Understand the network topology, VPN tunnels, and external access configurations.

  • Storage

    Explore the storage hierarchy, ZFS pools, and backup strategies.

docs.title: VPN Routing
docs.text:
The following containers route traffic through WireGuard:

  • qbittorrent

  • prowlarr

docs.title: Tailscale
docs.text: The jellyfin container has a connection to Tailscale.

docs.title: Containers
docs.text:
List of all active LXC containers on the server.

ID Name Status IP Description 100 tools running - General utility container for maintenance and tools. 101 beszel running - Lightweight server monitoring hub. 102 homepage running - A modern, fully static, fast, secure fully proxied, highly customizable application dashboard. 103 jellyfin running - The Free Software Media System. It allows you to collect, manage, streaming media. 104 jellyseerr running - A request management system for the Jellyfin media server. It helps you manage requests for new content. 105 prowlarr running - An indexer manager/proxy built on the popular *arr .net/react stack to integrate with your various PVR apps. 106 bazarr running - A companion application to Sonarr and Radarr. It manages and downloads subtitles based on your requirements. 107 sonarr running - Smart TV show PVR for independent newsgroup and torrent users. It monitors for new episodes of your favorite shows. 108 radarr running - A movie collection manager for Usenet and BitTorrent users. It monitors multiple RSS feeds for new movies. 109 wireguard running - A fast, modern, and secure VPN tunnel. 110 qbittorrent running - A free and open-source BitTorrent client. 111 bentopdf running - A PDF editor and management tool. 112 paperless-ngx running - A community-supported supercharged version of Paperless: scan, index and archive all your physical documents. 113 flaresolverr running - Proxy server to bypass Cloudflare protection. 114 n8n running - Workflow automation tool. Fair-code licensed alternative to Zapier/Tray.io. 115 ollama running - Get up and running with large language models locally.

docs.title: bazarr
docs.text:
Description

A companion application to Sonarr and Radarr. It manages and downloads subtitles based on your requirements.
